title: How to Install APK Files Safely
label: Safety
summary: Step-by-step guide for users who are new to APK installation.

sections.heading: Before You Download
sections.body: Only download files from trusted sources and check the app name, package name, version, size, and developer information.

sections.heading: Step 1: Download the APK
sections.body: Tap the download button and wait until the file is fully saved on your device.

sections.heading: Step 2: Allow Installation
sections.body: Android may ask permission to install apps from this source. Only allow it for sources you trust.

sections.heading: Step 3: Install and Open
sections.body: Open the downloaded file, review the information, then tap install. After installation, open the app from your launcher.

sections.heading: Safety Tips
sections.body: Scan downloaded files, avoid cracked paid apps, and keep clear disclaimers on your website for user safety.

title: How to Check App Version Before Download
label: Guide
summary: Learn where to find version code, size, and Android requirements.

sections.heading: Check Version Details
sections.body: Compare the version number, update date, and file size before downloading an app.

sections.heading: Review Requirements
sections.body: Make sure your phone meets the Android version and storage requirements shown on the listing.

title: Fix App Not Installed Error
label: Troubleshooting
summary: Common reasons and simple solutions for Android users.

sections.heading: Common Causes
sections.body: The error can appear when a file is incomplete, incompatible, or blocked by device policy.

sections.heading: What to Try
sections.body: Check storage, verify Android requirements, and download the file again from a trusted source.

title: How to Submit Your App
label: Website
summary: A page flow for developers to request listing on your site.

sections.heading: Submission Basics
sections.body: Ask developers for ownership details, app metadata, screenshots, and a legal download URL.

title: APK Safety Checklist
label: Security
summary: Important legal and safety checks before publishing APK content.

sections.heading: Listing Review
sections.body: Check distribution rights, trademark wording, file source, malware scan status, and user-facing disclaimers.

title: Best Free Tools for Android
label: Apps
summary: Example content layout for app recommendation posts.

sections.heading: Pick Trusted Tools
sections.body: Prioritize official developer links, clear update records, and transparent permission notes.
